title: I'm Cris from Tierra Bomba
overview: Cristian, an Afro-Colombian millennial from the Caribbean island of Tierra Bomba, must decide whether to continue acting or drop all his masks, and overcome his own fear to live his identity freely. Josephine, the director, follows Cristian for seven years across different countries during this quest for freedom.
